summary: Iteration 79: Verified all 360° avatar bug fixes for 3D/Pixar avatars. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Marketing AI Studio loads correctly with Presenter Avatar section and Add Avatar button.

details: ✓ is3dAvatar check exists based on inferredStyle
✓ openAvatarForEdit clears wrong angles for 3D avatars when front !== av.url
✓ Tab click handler checks for view360 tab
✓ Tab click handler calls startAuto360 for view360 tab
✓ Regenerate All 360° button exists with data-testid='regen-all-360-btn'
✓ Regenerate All 360° button is inside 360° View tab
✓ Regenerate All 360° button uses tempAvatar.url for 3D styles
✓ Regenerate All 360° clears angles before regenerating
✓ saveAvatarAndClose persists creation_mode for new avatars
✓ generate_avatar_variant uses avatar_style for is_3d check
✓ Marketing AI Studio loads via 'Create with AI Studio' button
✓ Add Avatar button found with data-testid='add-avatar-btn'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 verified all bug fixes for 360° view for 3D/Pixar avatars: (1) openAvatarForEdit now infers avatar_style from creation_mode for old avatars without avatar_style field - if creation_mode='3d' and no avatar_style, it defaults to '3d_pixar'. (2) openAvatarForEdit clears wrong angles for 3D avatars when savedAngles.front !== av.url (indicates old realistic angles on a 3D avatar). (3) 360° View tab click auto-triggers startAuto360 when loadedAngles < 4. (4) Regenerate All 360° button exists with data-testid='regen-all-360-btn' and uses tempAvatar.url for 3D styles. (5) creation_mode is persisted in saveAvatarAndClose (both edit and new) and saveAvatarAsNew. (6) Backend endpoints generate-avatar-360 and generate-avatar-variant accept avatar_style param. All code structure verified via static analysis. Actual AI generation not tested (requires API credits).

features_verified.bug_fix_1_avatar_style_inference: ✓ openAvatarForEdit infers avatar_style from creation_mode for old avatars
features_verified.bug_fix_2_clear_wrong_angles: ✓ openAvatarForEdit clears wrong angles for 3D avatars when front !== av.url
features_verified.bug_fix_3_auto_trigger_360: ✓ 360° View tab click auto-triggers startAuto360 when <4 angles loaded
features_verified.bug_fix_4_regenerate_all_button: ✓ Regenerate All 360° button exists and uses tempAvatar.url for 3D styles
features_verified.bug_fix_5_creation_mode_persistence: ✓ creation_mode persisted in saveAvatarAndClose and saveAvatarAsNew
features_verified.frontend_ui: ✓ Marketing AI Studio loads with Presenter Avatar section
